teardown() - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserRegistrationTest
Restores the Firestore collection configuration after tests complete.
tearDown() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantWaitlistTest
Cleans up Firestore test data and reverts collection names after each test.
tearDown() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerInviteNotificationsTest
Cleans up test data and restores production references.
tearDown() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerSampleNotificationsTest
Cleans up the test environment after execution.
testAcceptInvitation() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventDetailsTest
Tests that an entrant can accept an invitation to register.
testAddOrganizer() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerManageEventTest
Test to add a entrant to the organizer array of an event
testAllFieldsAcceptInput() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Smoke test: verifies that every interactive control on the event-creation screen accepts input without throwing, resetting, or routing input to the wrong field.
testBrowseEvents() - Method in class com.icarus.events.AdministratorDashboardTest
Tests that an administrator can browse the event list and see events.
testBrowseImages() - Method in class com.icarus.events.AdministratorDashboardTest
Tests that an administrator can browse the image list and see uploaded images.
testBrowseNotifications() - Method in class com.icarus.events.AdministratorDashboardTest
Tests that an administrator can browse the notification logs.
testBrowseUsers() - Method in class com.icarus.events.AdministratorDashboardTest
Tests that an administrator can browse the user list and see profiles.
testCancelSelectedEntrants() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
Tests that the organizer can cancel a selected entrant for the event.
testCancelWaitingEntrants() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
Tests that the organizer can cancel a waiting entrant for the event.
testCapacityFiltering() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantEventListTest
Tests that maximum capacity filtering reduces the displayed event list correctly.
testCategoryFiltering() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantEventListTest
Tests that category filtering updates the displayed event list correctly.
testCommentAdapterShowsDeletedLabelAndHidesSelection() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventCommentTest
Tests that the adapter renders a deleted comment using the deleted label and hides the selection icon for that row.
testCommentsButtonOpensCommentActivity() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventDetailsTest
Tests that an entrant can open the event comments screen from the event details page.
testCommentsLoadAndDeletedOnesAreFilteredOut() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventCommentTest
Tests that comments are loaded for the event and deleted comments are excluded.
testCoOrganizerInvitationNotification() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerInviteNotificationsTest
Verifies US 01.09.01: Entrant receives notification for co-organizer invitation.
testDateRangeFiltering() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantEventListTest
Tests that date range filtering reduces the displayed event list correctly.
testDeclineInvitation() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventDetailsTest
Tests that an entrant can decline an invitation.
testDeleteEvent() - Method in class com.icarus.events.AdministratorDashboardTest
Tests that an administrator can delete an event from the event list.
testDeleteImage() - Method in class com.icarus.events.AdministratorDashboardTest
Tests that an administrator can delete an image from the image list.
testDeleteProfile() - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserSettingsTest
Tests that an entrant can delete their profile from the settings page.
testDeleteUser() - Method in class com.icarus.events.AdministratorDashboardTest
Tests that an administrator can delete a user profile from the user list.
testDisplayedEventsMatchDatabase() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantEventListTest
Verifies that events inserted into Firestore appear in the entrant event list.
testEntrantMarkersLoadWithoutCrash() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantMapTest
Tests that the entrant map loads without crashing when the event has two entrants, each with a location GeoPoint.
testEntrantSignUpForEvent() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventDetailsTest
Tests that an entrant can join the waiting list from the event details page.
testEventCreatedWithoutWaitingListLimit() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies that leaving the optional capacity field empty creates an event whose Firestore capacity field is null.
testEventDetailsDisplayCoreData() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventDetailsTest
Tests that the event details page displays the core event information.
testEventHistoryDisplayed() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventHistoryTest
Verifies that the EventHistoryActivity displays the test event for the registered entrant.
testExportCsvEntrants() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
Tests that the organizer can export a CSV file of final entrants
testGeolocationDisabled() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies that leaving the geolocation switch in its default-off state stores geolocation = false and a null coordinates field in Firestore.
testGeolocationEnabled() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies that enabling the geolocation switch and completing the map dialog stores geolocation = true and a non-null coordinates GeoPoint in Firestore.
testImagelessEventCreationSavedToFirestore() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
End-to-end test: fills every form field, omits an event poster, submits the form, and asserts that the resulting Firestore document contains the correct values for all persisted fields.
testImageUploadFromDevice() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies the full image-upload path: selecting a poster from the device gallery triggers a Cloudinary upload, and the resulting Firestore event document stores a non-empty image URL.
testInviteEntrant() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerManageEventTest
Test to invite an entrant to a private entrant
testJoinWaitingList() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantWaitlistTest
Verifies that an entrant can successfully join a specific event's waiting list.
testLeaveWaitingList() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantWaitlistTest
Verifies that an entrant can successfully leave a specific event's waiting list.
testLocationIsCapitalisedBeforeSaving() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies that the activity normalises the location string before saving it to Firestore: the first character is uppercased and all remaining characters are lowercased, regardless of the casing entered by the user.
testLotteryGuidelinesDisplayed() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventDetailsTest
Tests that the lottery guidelines dialog can be opened from the event details page.
testMapHandlesEntrantWithNullLocation() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantMapTest
Tests that the entrant map loads correctly for an event where one entrant has a null location (e.g., joined without geolocation enabled or location was unavailable).
testMapIsDisplayed() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantMapTest
Tests that the entrant map view is displayed when opening an event with geolocation data.
testOpenQrScannerFromEventList() - Method in class com.icarus.events.QRCodeScanTest
Minimal test to verify that pressing the QR scan button in the event list opens the QRCodeActivity with the scanner open.
testOrganizerCanSoftDeleteComment() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventCommentTest
Tests that an organizer can soft-delete a selected comment.
testOrganizerIdStoredInCreatedEvent() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies that the current user's ID is included in the organizers array of the Firestore event document created by the activity.
testPersonalInformationOptionalPhone() - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserRegistrationTest
Verifies that an entrant can provide personal information in the registration screen, including name, email, and an optional phone number.
testPostCommentAddsComment() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventCommentTest
Tests that a user can post a new comment from the comment screen.
testPrivateEventDisabled() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies that leaving the private-event switch in its default-off state stores isPrivate = false in the Firestore event document.
testPrivateEventEnabled() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies that toggling the private-event switch on stores isPrivate = true in the Firestore event document.
testPrivateEventInvitationNotification() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerInviteNotificationsTest
Verifies US 01.05.06: Entrant receives notification for private event invitation.
testQRCodeCreated() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerManageEventTest
Test to see if the quick share menu appears when creating a QR code and the event is public
testQRCodeFailedToShare() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerManageEventTest
Test to see if the quick share menu appears when creating a QR code and the event is private
testRegistrationByDeviceId() - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserRegistrationTest
Tests that a user can register using their device ID.
testReplacedDeclined() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerManageEventTest
Test to replace cancelled entrants in an event's entrant subcollection with entrants in the waiting list
testSampleAttendees() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerManageEventTest
Test to sample a single entrant from the waiting list
testSamplingSendsNotifications() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerSampleNotificationsTest
Verifies that the sampling process correctly generates both positive and negative notifications.
testSearchBarFiltering() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantEventListTest
Tests that typing words into the search bar updates the displayed event list.
testSearchBarWithCategoryFiltering() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EntrantEventListTest
Tests that the displayed event list updates when both search text and filters are applied together.
testSelectedImageDisplayedInPosterView() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies that selecting a gallery image causes the poster ImageView to display content other than the default placeholder.
testSendMessageToCancelledEntrants() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
Tests that the organizer can send a notification to entrants in the cancelled list.
testSendMessageToSelectedEntrants() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
Tests that the organizer can send a notification to entrants in the selected list.
testSendMessageToWaitingEntrants() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
Tests that the organizer can send a notification to entrants in the waiting list.
testToggleNotifications() - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserSettingsTest
Tests that an entrant can opt out of receiving notifications from admins and organizers.
testUpdateImage() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerManageEventTest
Tests to upload a new image and verify it exists in cloudinary and firestore
testUpdateProfile() - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserProfileTest
Tests that an entrant can update their profile information.
testUpdateProfileInvalidEmail() - Method in class com.icarus.events.UserProfileTest
Tests that invalid email input does not overwrite the existing valid email.
testValidationBlocksSubmitWhenDatesAreMissing() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies that submitting the form without any dates selected triggers activity-level validation and does not write a document to Firestore.
testValidationBlocksSubmitWhenRequiredTextFieldsEmpty() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies that submitting the form with name, category, and location all empty triggers activity-level validation and does not write a document to Firestore.
testViewCancelledEntrants() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
Tests that the organizer can view all cancelled entrants for the event.
testViewChosenEntrants() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
Tests that the organizer can view all chosen entrants for the event.
testViewRegisteredEntrants() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
Tests that the organizer can view all confirmed entrants for the event.
testViewWaitingEntrants() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
Tests that the organizer can view all waiting entrants for the event.
testWaitingListDisplayed() - Method in class com.icarus.events.EventDetailsTest
Tests that the waiting-list count is displayed through the event details adapter.
testWaitingListLimitStoredCorrectly() - Method in class com.icarus.events.OrganizerCreateEventTest
Verifies that the numeric value entered in the capacity field is persisted exactly in the Firestore capacity field.
